name: Prefer not using 'java.io.File' to avoid violating the Enterprise JavaBeans (EJB) specification
Ensure you don't use JNI for security reason
Prefer using container's resource management facilities to obtain connections to resources instead of using DriverManager class allowing direct connection to the database
Ensure not having EJBs using 'synchronized' qualifier or calling 'wait', 'notify' and 'notifyAll' Methods as this might corrupt the normal behavior
Ensure your application does not process thread with unsanitized stream
Ensure your application does not process thread with unsanitized stream
